name: digital-control
source: official SIMPLIS examples plus installed-library canonical generator names

digital_comparator.validation: verify comparator symbol and pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

digital_buffer.validation: verify buffer symbol and pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

digital_latch.validation: verify latch symbol and pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

digital_and.validation: verify AND gate symbol and pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

digital_or.validation: verify OR gate symbol and pins in the configured installed .sxslb libraries before placement

pwm_source.validation: verify waveform source properties before using it as a PWM source

pop_trigger.validation: after netlisting, resolve TRIG_GATE to an internal event such as X1.!D_CYCLE before claiming POP works
